translations.### 使用 Google Apps Script 三步驟免費建立 Github: ### Create a Github Repo Star Notifier for Free in Three Steps Using Google Apps Script
translations.### 自己打造 Github Repo Star Notifier\n\n: ### Build Your Own Github Repo Star Notifier
translations.**Which events would you like to trigger:
**Which events would you like to trigger this webhook?**  
**Select** `Let me select individual events.`  
**⚠️ Uncheck** `Pushes`  
**️️️️⚠️ Check** `Watches` — note this is not `Stars` (but Stars also track starring actions, so if using Stars, you need to adjust the GAS action logic accordingly)
translations.**⚠️️️ 題外話，請注意如果程式碼有修改需要更新部署才會生效⚠️**\n\n: **⚠️️️ Side note: Please remember to redeploy after code changes for them to take effect ⚠️**
translations.**並記下 Token，如果日後遺忘需要重新產生，無法再次查看** 。\n: **And note down the Token, as it cannot be viewed again and must be regenerated if forgotten.**
translations.**補充 Github Webook 當有人按 Star 時會打進來的資料如下：: **Additional data received from Github Webhook when someone stars the repo:**
translations.*因 Line Notify 將於 [2025/04/01 關閉](https:: *Since Line Notify will be [shutting down on 2025/04/01](https://notify-bot.line.me/closing-announce){:target="_blank"}, please refer to **my latest article "[Quickly migrate Line Notify to Telegram Bot notifications in 10 minutes](../6922e90ba90c/)"** to switch to Telegram for notification integration.*
translations.- Additional Instructions: Enter anythin:
- Additional Instructions: Enter anything you want, I entered "`Release`"

- Who can access: **Please change to "`Everyone`"**

- Click "Deploy"
translations.- Back to [Github](https://github.com/){:
- Back to [Github](https://github.com/){:target="_blank"}

- We can set up Webhooks for Organizations (all repos inside) or a single Repo to listen for new ⭐️ stars.
translations.- Choose \"Copy\"\n\n- **And note down t:
- Choose "Copy"

- **And note down the Token, as it cannot be viewed again and must be regenerated if forgotten.**
translations.- Copy & write down this random string\n: - Copy & write down this random string
translations.- Go to [Line Notify](https://notify-bot:
- Go to [Line Notify](https://notify-bot.line.me/my/){:target="_blank"}

- After logging into your Line account, scroll down to find the "Generate access token (For developers)" section.
- Go to [Random.org](https://www.random.org/strings/?num=1&len=32&digits=on&upperalpha=on&loweralpha=on&unique=on&format=html&rnd=new){:target="_blank"} to generate a random string.
translations.- Payload URL **:** Enter the `GAS URL`:
- Payload URL **:** Enter the `GAS URL` and manually add your own security token `?secret=githubWebhookSecret` at the end of the URL.  
  For example, if your `GAS URL` is `https://script.google.com/macros/s/XXX/exec` and `githubWebhookSecret` is `123456`, then **the URL will be: `https://script.google.com/macros/s/XXX/exec?secret=123456`.**

- **Content type:** Select `application/json`

- **Which events would you like to trigger this webhook?**  
  **Select** `Let me select individual events.`  
  **⚠️ Uncheck** `Pushes`  
  **️️️️⚠️ Check** `Watches` — note this is not `Stars` (but Stars also track starring actions, so if using Stars, you need to adjust the GAS action logic accordingly)

- Select " `Active` "

- Click "Add webhook"

- Setup Complete
translations.- Token Name: Enter the desired bot titl:
- Token Name: Enter the desired bot title, which will appear before the message (e.g. `Github Repo Notifer: XXXX`)

- Choose where to send the message: I selected `1-on-1 chat with LINE Notify` to send messages to myself via the official LINE Notify bot.

- Click "Generate token"
translations.> *Since Line Notify will be [shutting d: > *Since Line Notify will be [shutting down on 2025/04/01](https://notify-bot.line.me/closing-announce){:target="_blank"}, please refer to **my latest article "[Quickly migrate Line Notify to Telegram Bot notifications in 10 minutes](../6922e90ba90c/)"** to switch to Telegram for notification integration.*
translations.> Due to [GAS limitations](https://issue: > Due to [GAS limitations](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/67764685?pli=1){:target="_blank"}, it is not possible to access `Headers` in `doPost(e)`. Therefore, the Github Webhook [standard authentication method](https://docs.github.com/en/webhooks-and-events/webhooks/securing-your-webhooks){:target="_blank"} cannot be used. Instead, manual string matching verification with a `?secret=` query parameter must be used.
translations.Copy & 記下此隨機字串\n: Copy & write down this random string
translations.Payload URL **：** 輸入 `GAS 網址` 並在網址後面手動加上:
Payload URL **:** Enter the `GAS URL` and manually add our own security token `?secret=githubWebhookSecret` at the end of the URL.  
For example, if your `GAS URL` is `https://script.google.com/macros/s/XXX/exec` and `githubWebhookSecret` is `123456`, then **the URL will be: `https://script.google.com/macros/s/XXX/exec?secret=123456`.**
Token Name: Enter the desired bot title, which will appear before the message (e.g. `Github Repo Notifer: XXXX`)

translations.`lineToken` & `githubWebhookSecret` 帶上前一: Set `lineToken` and `githubWebhookSecret` with the values copied from the previous step.
translations.iOS 上的 [Github](https://apps.apple.com/t: The [Github](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/github/id1477376905){:target="_blank"} App on iOS or third-party apps like [GitTrends](https://github.com/brminnick/GitTrends){:target="_blank"} do not support this feature either.
translations.再加上只是為了「虛榮心」裝一個 App，心裡不太踏實，怕有資安風險問題。\n\n: Also, if the app is built just for "vanity," it feels uneasy and there is concern about potential security risks.
translations.出現「Google hasn’t verified this app」因為我們要: The message "Google hasn’t verified this app" appears because the app we are developing is for personal use and does not require Google verification.
translations.前往 **[Google Apps Script](https://script: Go to **[Google Apps Script](https://script.google.com/home/start){:target="_blank"}** and click the "+ New Project" button at the top left.
translations.前往 [Random.org](https://www.random.org/s: Go to [Random.org](https://www.random.org/strings/?num=1&len=32&digits=on&upperalpha=on&loweralpha=on&unique=on&format=html&rnd=new){:target="_blank"} to generate a random string.
translations.即可完成程式碼更新部署。\n\n: The code update and deployment can be completed immediately.
translations.回到 設定的 Organizations Repo / Repo 上點擊「Sta: Go back to the configured Organizations Repo / Repo and click "Star" or un-star first, then re-"Star":
translations.因 [GAS 限制](https://issuetracker.google.c: Due to [GAS limitations](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/67764685?pli=1){:target="_blank"}, it is not possible to access `Headers` in `doPost(e)`. Therefore, the Github Webhook [standard authentication method](https://docs.github.com/en/webhooks-and-events/webhooks/securing-your-webhooks){:target="_blank"} cannot be used. Instead, manual string matching verification with a `?secret=` query parameter must be used.
translations.因此對 ⭐️ 星星的觀測多少有點強迫症，時不時就刷一下 Github 查看 ⭐️: Therefore, I have a bit of an obsession with watching the ⭐️ stars and frequently refresh Github to see if the ⭐️ star count has increased. I wondered if there was a more proactive way to get notified immediately when someone clicks the ⭐️ star, without having to manually check.
translations.基於以上，其實我們可以直接用 Google Apps Script 免費、快速打: Based on the above, we can actually use Google Apps Script to quickly and freely create our own Github Repo Star Notifier.
translations.完成程式撰寫之後點擊右上角「部署」->「新增部署作業」：\n\n: After completing the code, click the top right corner "Deploy" -> "New deployment":
translations.完成部署後可在結果頁面的「網頁應用程式」得到 Request URL，點擊「複製: After deployment, you can find the Request URL on the "Web App" page. Click "Copy" and save this GAS URL.
translations.就會收到推播通知囉！\n\n: You will receive a push notification!
translations.左側選取類型選擇「網頁應用程式」：\n\n: On the left side, select the type "Web App":
translations.我們可以對 Organizations (裡面所有 Repo)或單個 Repo: We can set up Webhooks for Organizations (all repos inside) or a single Repo to listen for new ⭐️ stars.
translations.我們會用這組字串做為 Github Webhook 與 Goolge Apps: We will use this string as the request verification medium between Github Webhook and Google Apps Script.
translations.撰寫 GAS 串接 Github Webhook 轉發按星星 Like 通知到: Writing GAS to Connect Github Webhook and Forward Star Like Notifications to Line
translations.新增說明：隨意輸入，我輸入「 `Release` 」\n: Additional Instructions: Enter anything you want, I entered "`Release`"
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本文以 Line 做為通知媒介，如果你想使用其他通訊軟體通知可以詢問 [Chat: This article uses Line as the notification medium. If you want to use other messaging apps for notifications, you can ask [ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com){:target="_blank"} how to implement it.
translations.登入你的 Line 帳號之後拉到底找到「Generate access toke: After logging into your Line account, scroll down to find the "Generate access token (For developers)" section.
translations.要使更改的程式碼生效，同樣點擊右上角「部署」-> 選擇「管理部署作業」->選擇右: To apply the code changes, click "Deploy" at the top right -> select "Manage deployments" -> click the "✏️" icon at the top right -> choose "Create new version" -> then click "Deploy".
translations.詢問 [ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com){:t: Ask [ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com){:target="_blank"} how to implement Line Notify
translations.試了其中幾個效果不如預期，有的已不在運作、有的只能在每 5/10/20 個 ⭐️: I tried a few of them, but the results were not as expected. Some no longer work, some only send notifications every 5/10/20 ⭐️ stars (I'm just small, so even 1 new ⭐️ makes me happy 😝), and notifications can only be sent via email, but I want to use SNS notifications.
translations.跳出帳號選擇 Pop-up 後選擇自己當前的 Gmail 帳號：\n\n: After the account selection pop-up appears, choose your current Gmail account:
translations.身為開源專案的維護者，不為錢不為名，只為一個 **虛榮心** ；每當看到有新的: As an open-source project maintainer, not for money or fame, but for a sense of **vanity**; every time a new ⭐️ star appears, I secretly rejoice; the time and effort spent on the project is truly being used and helping friends with the same problems.
translations.這邊我把專案取名為 `My-Github-Repo-Notifier` 方便日後: Here, I named the project `My-Github-Repo-Notifier` for easy identification in the future.
translations.進入 Organizations / Repo -> 「Settings」->: Go to Organizations / Repo -> "Settings" -> find "Webhooks" on the left side -> "Add webhook":
translations.選擇訊息要傳送到的地方：我選擇 `1-on-1 chat with LINE N: Choose where to send the message: I selected `1-on-1 chat with LINE Notify` to send messages to myself via the official LINE Notify bot.
translations.首先考慮尋找現有工具達成，到 [Github Marketplace](http: First, consider finding existing tools. I searched at [Github Marketplace](https://github.com/marketplace?type=apps&query=Star+Notifier+){:target="_blank"} and found several well-made tools available.
translations.首次部署，需要點擊「授予存取權」：\n\n: For the first deployment, you need to click "Grant Access":
translations.點擊左上方「未命名的專案」重新命名專案。\n\n: Click the top left "Untitled Project" to rename the project.
